title: brodiaea laxa var. candida
intro: Brodiaea laxa var. candida is a subspecies of the Brodiaea laxa plant, commonly known as the white brodiaea, which is a perennial herbaceous plant with white flowers. The medicinal properties of Brodiaea laxa var. candida include its potential use as a diuretic and to treat urinary issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, promote kidney function, and support the excretion of excess fluids in the body. Brodiaea laxa var. candida can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
